THERESA-WISDEL_AUTO_ATTACK_ACTION.title: Ancestor Launcher
THERESA-CHARGING_POWER.title: Charging
THERESA-CHARGING_POWER.description: This enemy is building up power. The higher the level, the greater the threat.
THERESA-CHARGING_POWER.smartDescription: This enemy is building up power. Current level: [red]{Amount}[/red].
THERESA-THOUSANDS_WISH_POWER.title: Thousand Wishes
THERESA-DISASTER_STANCE.title: Disaster Stance
THERESA-DISASTER_STANCE.description:
[red]Attack[/red] damage taken is increased by [blue]20%[/blue].
After taking unblocked damage, exit this [red]Stance[/red].
On exit, gain [green]Disaster Power[/green]: damage taken is reduced by [blue]20%[/blue] for 1 turn.
THERESA-DISASTER_STANCE.smartDescription:
[red]Attack[/red] damage taken is increased by [blue]20%[/blue].
After taking unblocked damage, exit this [red]Stance[/red].
On exit, gain [green]Disaster Power[/green]: damage taken is reduced by [blue]20%[/blue] for 1 turn.
THERESA-DISASTER_POWER.title: Disaster Power
THERESA-DISASTER_POWER.description: Damage taken is reduced by [blue]20%[/blue]. Removed at the end of your turn.
THERESA-DISASTER_POWER.smartDescription: Damage taken is reduced by [blue]20%[/blue]. Removed at the end of your turn.
THERESA-HATRED_TIME_POWER.title: Era of Vengeance
THERESA-HATRED_TIME_POWER.description: Counts down each turn. When it reaches [blue]0[/blue], resets to [blue]2[/blue] and applies [blue]1[/blue] [red]Hate[/red] to its owner.
THERESA-HATRED_TIME_POWER.smartDescripti: Counts down each turn. When it reaches [blue]0[/blue], resets to [blue]2[/blue] and applies [blue]1[/blue] [red]Hate[/red] to its owner.
THERESA-SILK_POWER.title: Silken Threads
THERESA_RINGING_POWER.title: Ringing
THERESA_RINGING_POWER.description: After you play a card this turn, your other afflicted cards cannot be played.
THERESA_RINGING_POWER.smartDescription: After you play a card this turn, your other afflicted cards cannot be played.
